description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Examples that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to build multiple examples across different operating systems (ubuntu-16.04, windows-latest, macos-latest), Python versions (2.7, 3.7), and example directories. For each job, check out the repository with submodules, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies including PlatformIO and adafruit-nrfutil, and then build the specified example using PlatformIO.
